- <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i>
  <a href="mailto:dhiraanan3@gmail.com">dhiraanan3@gmail.com</a>

- <i class="bi bi-github"></i>
  <a href="https://github.com/TAD600" target="_blank">GitHub</a>

- <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
  <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7403-9862" target="_blank">ORCID</a>

- <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/dhiraanan/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>

- <i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i>
  <a href="https://www.du.ac.bd/body/faculty_details/ECO/2459" target="_blank">University of Dhaka Profile</a>
